'''Mugruebe''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Frog/Legends|frog]]-like [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]].

==Biology and appearance==
Roughly twice the size of a [[Womp rat/Legends|Womp rat]], a rodent native to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], mugruebe had four limbs in total, two large rear [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] used for movement and two far smaller fore limbs protruding from the creatures chin with two digits each. Members of the species also had two [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], a large [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] including a [[Tongue/Legends|tongue]] and a patterned hide. Mugrebe were also capable of producing mucus, which was not solid in nature.<ref name="BF:ANT">''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]''</ref>

==History==
Mugruebe were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] in the [[Mirgoshir system/Legends|Mirgoshir system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector]]. They were herded by the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] occupants of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] for food and were the main ingredient in the traditional [[mugruebe stew]], which was popular on Agamar but not elsewhere in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. One family to raise mugruebes on Agamar was that of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], whose parents owned a struggling ranch of the creatures. The ranch however was destroyed by a galactic bombardment carried out by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces as punishment for resistance to the Empire on Agamar. [[Mugruebe spit-sauce]] was an ingredient used in [[Agamar slider]] served at [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]], a diner on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] owned by the [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]].
